title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: Google DeepMind's WeatherNext is a global weather forecasting AI model that successfully predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track in October 2025, providing early warnings days before the Category 5 storm made landfall in Jamaica. The system enabled meteorologists and local authorities to issue evacuation warnings and protect communities, demonstrating AI's role in meteorology alongside partnerships with institutions like the National Hurricane Center.
